message:
Fix critical bugs from agent integration

**Bug Fixes:**

1. Fixed runtime detection in nested blocks
   - detectRuntimeNeeds now recursively checks if/while/for bodies
   - Fixes: boolean_operators example now compiles (was missing runtime import)

2. Fixed string constant printing
   - print() with string literals now uses PyString.getValue()
   - Handles both string variables and string constants correctly

3. Fixed runtime import mechanism
   - Copy all runtime .zig files to /tmp before compilation
   - Includes pytuple.zig which was missing
   - Fixes: "unable to load 'runtime.zig': FileNotFound" errors

**Impact:**
- Boolean operators now work correctly in if statements
- String literals in print() work properly
- All runtime-dependent code compiles successfully

**Test Results:**
- 8/75 passing (10.7%)
- All previously passing tests still pass
- Boolean operators fully functional

Files modified:
- src/codegen.zig - Added recursive runtime detection, fixed print formatting
- src/compiler.zig - Copy runtime files to /tmp for imports
